extractEntities.title: Extract entities
extractEntities.intro: Paste the chapter text (or any chunk you want analysed). The LLM will propose named entities and you pick which to keep.
extractEntities.placeholder: Paste source text here, or load from the currently-loaded pages.
extractEntities.loadFromPagesTooltip: Load text from pages that have already been OCRed
extractEntities.autoOcrExtractTooltip: Run detect+OCR on every open page, then extract entities — best for a freshly imported chapter
extractEntities.noLoadedText: No text in the loaded documents. Run OCR first.
extractEntities.noRecognisedText: No text recognised on any page. Try OCR manually.

glossaryImport.title: Import glossary
glossaryImport.csvMissingColumn: Missing required column "{{column}}" in CSV header.
glossaryImport.parsedSummary_one: Parsed {{count}} entry. Duplicates (same source + category) are skipped silently.
glossaryImport.parsedSummary_other: Parsed {{count}} entries. Duplicates (same source + category) are skipped silently.
glossaryImport.skippedIncomplete_one: Skipped {{count}} row with missing source / target / category.
glossaryImport.skippedIncomplete_other: Skipped {{count}} rows with missing source / target / category.

costDashboard.title: LLM cost — all-time
costDashboard.empty: No LLM calls logged yet for this project.
costDashboard.footnote: Token counts depend on what each provider reports. Cost uses the per-1M rates saved on each profile — set them in Profiles tab for accurate $ figures.

settings.title: Settings
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize how Koharu looks on your device.
settings.enginesDescription: Pick which ML model handles each pipeline stage. Most stages only have one option today — more will land in future releases.
settings.engineDetectorAnimeYoloHint: Anime Text YOLO (mayocream/anime-text-yolo, YOLO12) is tuned for anime/manga text and catches SFX, stylised titles, and out-of-bubble text the default detector misses. Bubble mask still comes from the default detector (YOLO has no bubble branch). Switching variant reloads the model on next Process — pick N for speed, X for max recall. Raise Confidence (~0.35–0.45) to cut over-detection on noisy pages; lower it to rescue faint SFX.
settings.engineOcrHint: MIT-48px is the production default and handles Latin / CJK / Thai. Manga OCR (mayocream/manga-ocr) is tuned for Japanese handwriting + stylised SFX; first switch downloads ~100MB of weights.
settings.engineOcrCloudHint: Cloud Vision OCR sends each detected bubble as its own image crop to the selected vision-capable LLM. Quality is usually best, but every page costs tokens. Use for hard pages; pick a local engine for batch translation in the queue (batch never uses Cloud Vision — it falls back to MIT-48px). Calls are logged to the Cost Dashboard as use_case=ocr.
settings.engineOcrNoVisionProfile: ⚠ No vision-capable profile available. Open the Profiles tab in the project sidebar, add an OpenAI / Claude / Gemini / OpenRouter profile with a vision-capable model (e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3.5-sonnet, gemini-2.0-flash), and click Apply. This page will refresh automatically.
settings.thaiPostProcessDescription: Cleanup pass applied automatically after every LLM translation.
settings.thaiPostProcessDetails: Collapses excess whitespace between Thai characters (e.g. "กิน ข้าว" → "กินข้าว") and converts ASCII quotes to typographic curly quotes ("..." → "..."). Mixed-script content like character names is preserved — "กิน rice" keeps its space.
settings.storageDescription: On-disk data koharu manages outside your project folders. Project files (.khr / chapter pages / SQLite) are never touched by anything here.
